title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Don Chinjao, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as luffy’s battle with Chinjao reaches its peak, proving his strength and reshaping Chinjao’s hatred into recognition.
